task_completion.description: Log in to the SEB Server and navigate to the Exam Administration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server web interface is visible, showing the Exam Administration dashboard or list of exams.
In the Exam Administration list, the row for 'Spring 2026: Biology 101' shows an active status (e.g., a checked box, green toggle, or 'Active' label).
In the Exam Administration list, the row for 'Spring 2026: Chemistry 201' shows an active status.
In the Exam Administration list, the row for 'Spring 2026: Calculus I' shows an active status.

task_completion.description: Ensure the deprecated exam 'Spring 2026: Physics 301 [DEPRECATED]' remains inactive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Exam Administration list, the row for 'Spring 2026: Physics 301 [DEPRECATED]' shows an inactive/disabled status.

task_completion.description: Ensure exams from other semesters like 'Fall 2025: History 101' remain inactive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Exam Administration list, the row for 'Fall 2025: History 101' shows an inactive/disabled status.

integrity.description: The agent used the SEB Server graphical user interface to activate the exams.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the SEB Server UI at localhost:8080, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the active status.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements/Console tab) are open modifying the HTML to artificially display an active state.

integrity.description: The results are shown within the actual SEB Server application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the SEB Server Exam Administration layout and is not a text file, spreadsheet, or mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specific exams that MUST be activated are: 'Spring 2026: Biology 101', 'Spring 2026: Chemistry 201', and 'Spring 2026: Calculus I'. The exams that MUST remain inactive are: 'Spring 2026: Physics 301 [DEPRECATED]' and 'Fall 2025: History 101'.
